scripts.dev: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis && concurrently "uv run --directory apps/api uvicorn src.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.contracts:gen: curl -s http://localhost:8000/openapi.json | pnpm --filter @ngti/contracts exec openapi-typescript /dev/stdin -o src/index.ts
scripts.health: uv run --directory apps/api ruff check src tests && uv run --directory apps/api mypy --strict src && uv run --directory apps/api pytest && pnpm --filter web run lint && pnpm --filter web run typecheck && pnpm --filter web run test
